tasks.subject: Task 1: Create SKILL.md with Frontmatter and Overview
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the skill file with metadata, hard rules, and overview.

**Files:**
- Create: `~/.claude/skills/session-retrospective/SKILL.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Valid YAML frontmatter with name and description
- [ ] Hard rules section with all 5 rules
- [ ] Overview section

```json:metadata
{"files": ["~/.claude/skills/session-retrospective/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "head -30 ~/.claude/skills/session-retrospective/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Valid frontmatter", "5 hard rules", "Overview present"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Write Phase 1 (Analyze) and Phase 2 (Solicit)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add analysis and solicitation phases.

**Files:**
- Modify: `~/.claude/skills/session-retrospective/SKILL.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Phase 1 produces numbered friction list with what/why/target
- [ ] Phase 2 solicits user additions

```json:metadata
{"files": ["~/.claude/skills/session-retrospective/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -c 'Phase' ~/.claude/skills/session-retrospective/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Phase 1 with friction list format", "Phase 2 solicits additions"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Write Phase 3 (Discuss)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add discussion phase with intent/wording stages.

**Files:**
- Modify: `~/.claude/skills/session-retrospective/SKILL.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Stage A (Intent) with push-back instructions
- [ ] Stage B (Wording) with text proposal and target file

```json:metadata
{"files": ["~/.claude/skills/session-retrospective/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -c 'Stage' ~/.claude/skills/session-retrospective/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Stage A intent discussion", "Stage B wording discussion", "Push-back instructions"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Write Phase 4 (Review)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add review phase with agent dispatch.

**Files:**
- Modify: `~/.claude/skills/session-retrospective/SKILL.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Agent checks consistency, quality, scope
- [ ] Local-contradicts-global flagged as possible global flaw
- [ ] No auto-resolution

```json:metadata
{"files": ["~/.claude/skills/session-retrospective/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep 'agent' ~/.claude/skills/session-retrospective/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Agent dispatch instructions", "Three review checks", "No auto-resolution rule"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Write Phase 5 (Write) and Phase 6 (Follow-ups)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add write and follow-up phases.

**Files:**
- Modify: `~/.claude/skills/session-retrospective/SKILL.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Phase 5 writes with explicit confirmation
- [ ] Phase 6 lists follow-up actions
- [ ] Follow-ups are informational only

```json:metadata
{"files": ["~/.claude/skills/session-retrospective/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -c 'Phase' ~/.claude/skills/session-retrospective/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Write with confirmation", "Follow-up action list", "No enforcement on follow-ups"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Write Patterns and Anti-Patterns
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add patterns and anti-patterns with examples.

**Files:**
- Modify: `~/.claude/skills/session-retrospective/SKILL.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 8 patterns with examples where specified
- [ ] 9 anti-patterns with examples where specified
- [ ] 0 or 1 example per entry

```json:metadata
{"files": ["~/.claude/skills/session-retrospective/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -c 'Bad:\\|Good:' ~/.claude/skills/session-retrospective/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All patterns from spec", "All anti-patterns from spec", "Examples in Bad/Good format"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Final Review and Verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify complete skill file is well-formed and discoverable.

**Files:**
- Verify: `~/.claude/skills/session-retrospective/SKILL.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Under 500 lines
- [ ] All 6 phases present
- [ ] No placeholder text
- [ ] Discoverable in skills list

```json:metadata
{"files": ["~/.claude/skills/session-retrospective/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "wc -l ~/.claude/skills/session-retrospective/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Under 500 lines", "All phases present", "No placeholders", "Discoverable"]}
```
